RQ1.title: Music Discovery Friction
RQ1.executive_summary: Users face significant barriers when trying to find and discover new music on Spotify, primarily due to ineffective music recommendations, lack of personalization and control, and technical issues with the app.

jtbd_summary.situation: When looking for new music to listen to
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover new music that they will enjoy
jtbd_summary.outcome: to find new music that matches their taste

observed_workarounds: Using a different music streaming service
Asking friends for music recommendations
Manually creating playlists with mixed songs
Using online music discovery platforms
Using language learning apps

key_findings.finding: Ineffective music recommendations are a major barrier to music discovery
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Poor music recommendations and lack of control over recommendations are common issues across multiple clusters

key_findings.finding: Technical issues with the app can hinder music discovery
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Some users experience issues with playlist updates, music playback, and app performance

key_findings.finding: Users want more control over music discovery features
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users want to be able to customize their music discovery experience, including playlist updates and music playback

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Effective music recommendations that match user taste
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced algorithmic recommendations based on user listening history and preferences

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Provide more control over music discovery features
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Personalized playlist updates and music playback options

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Address technical issues with the app
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Smooth and seamless music listening experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Regular app updates and performance optimization

RQ2.title: Algorithmic Repetition & Looping in Automated Mixes
RQ2.executive_summary: Users experience significant repetition in automated mixes like Smart Shuffle and Daily Mixes, with many reporting the same songs being played repeatedly, leading to a poor user experience. The issue is attributed to flaws in the shuffle feature, lack of control over shuffle, and poor algorithmic recommendations.

jtbd_summary.situation: When using Spotify's automated mixes, such as Smart Shuffle and Daily Mixes
jtbd_summary.motivation: to have a reliable and enjoyable music listening experience without repetition
jtbd_summary.outcome: to improve the overall music listening experience with diverse and personalized song selections

observed_workarounds: Creating a new playlist with specific songs
Using a different music streaming service
Manually shuffling playlists
Asking friends for music recommendations
Manually creating playlists with similar songs

key_findings.finding: Users experience significant repetition in automated mixes
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Many users report the same songs being played repeatedly in Smart Shuffle and Daily Mixes

key_findings.finding: Lack of control over shuffle and poor algorithmic recommendations contribute to the issue
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report lack of control over shuffle and poor algorithmic recommendations in automated mixes

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve the shuffle algorithm to reduce repetition
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want a reliable and enjoyable music listening experience without repetition
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle feature with more diverse and personalized song selections

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Provide users with more control over automated mixes
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want more control over shuffle and algorithmic recommendations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Customizable settings for automated mixes, such as song selection and playlist management

RQ3.title: Spotify Recommendation Algorithm Sentiment Analysis
RQ3.executive_summary: Users exhibit mixed sentiments towards Spotify's recommendation algorithms, with key areas of dissatisfaction including poor music recommendations, lack of control over recommendations, and perceived biases, while appreciating music discovery features and finding new music aligned with their tastes.

jtbd_summary.situation: When looking for new music or artists on Spotify
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover music that fits their tastes and preferences
jtbd_summary.outcome: to enjoy a personalized music experience

observed_workarounds: Using other music streaming services
Creating playlists manually
Searching for music on other platforms
Manually searching for music
Creating custom playlists
Using a 'Vibe' or 'Keep in Rotation' button as a workaround for separate song likes

key_findings.finding: Inaccurate music recommendations are a major source of dissatisfaction
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 40% of users reported inaccurate recommendations, Cluster 935: 40% of users reported inaccurate artist recommendations

key_findings.finding: Users desire more control over recommendations
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 933: users want separate song likes and more control over recommendations

key_findings.finding: Perceived biases in recommendations, such as mainstream bias, contribute to dissatisfaction
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: users reported a lack of personalization and inaccurate recommendations

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users desire accurate and personalized music recommendations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced algorithm that incorporates user feedback and listening habits

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Provide users with more control over recommendations
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to customize their music discovery experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Introduction of features like separate song likes and user-controlled recommendation filters

RQ4.title: User Discovery Methods & Behaviors
RQ4.executive_summary: Users employ various approaches to discover new music on Spotify, including manual search, custom playlists, and features like Discover Weekly. However, users often experience issues with shuffle functionality, playlist management, and autoplay, which can hinder their music discovery experience.

jtbd_summary.situation: Users are trying to discover new music on Spotify
jtbd_summary.motivation: To enjoy a personalized and seamless music experience
jtbd_summary.outcome: To discover new songs and artists without interruptions or frustrations

observed_workarounds: de-selecting shuffle, letting it play a few songs in order, then re-enabling shuffle
uninstalling and reinstalling the app to resolve glitches
hiding songs in playlists after listening to them
creating own playlists to avoid unwanted songs
manually changing the podcast
switching to a different app
redownloading the app to check for feature updates

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with shuffle functionality, including repetition of same songs
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report that the shuffle feature often plays the same songs repeatedly, which can be frustrating

key_findings.finding: Users have difficulty managing and maintaining playlists
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report issues with playlist disappearance, unwanted songs in playlists, and limited song selection

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with Discover Weekly playlist, including old and unupdated music recommendations
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report that the Discover Weekly playlist often plays old and unupdated music recommendations, which can be frustrating

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve shuffle functionality to provide more diverse and randomized playlists
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to enjoy a varied and randomized playlist without repetition
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle algorithm that takes into account user listening history and preferences

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance playlist management features to allow for easier creation and maintenance of playlists
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to have full control over the music they listen to without interruptions or limitations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Improved playlist editing and management tools, including features for hiding and removing unwanted songs

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve Discover Weekly playlist to provide more updated and personalized music recommendations
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to discover new songs and artists without interruptions or frustrations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced music recommendation algorithm that takes into account user listening history and preferences

RQ5.title: Feature-Specific Performance of Spotify Discovery Features
RQ5.executive_summary: Spotify users express dissatisfaction with the performance of specific discovery features, including issues with shuffle, Discover Weekly, and smart shuffle, highlighting opportunities for improvement to enhance the overall user experience.

jtbd_summary.situation: When using Spotify's discovery features, such as Discover Weekly, Release Radar, Smart Shuffle, or AI DJ
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover new music, manage playlists effectively, and have a seamless music listening experience
jtbd_summary.outcome: to find new music that they will enjoy, manage their playlists without issues, and improve the overall music listening experience

observed_workarounds: Creating a new playlist with specific songs
Using a different music streaming service
Manually creating playlists with mixed songs
Manually shuffling playlists
Asking friends for music recommendations

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with shuffle feature, including shuffling to songs from different playlists
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report that the shuffle feature often plays songs from different playlists, which is not the expected behavior

key_findings.finding: Users have difficulty managing their playlists, including adding and removing songs
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report issues with songs disappearing from playlists and difficulty adding songs to playlists

key_findings.finding: Users are not satisfied with the weekly discovery feature, including poor recommendations and lack of control
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report that the weekly discovery feature often recommends songs that are not to their liking, and they have limited control over the feature

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with smart shuffle feature, including inconsistent behavior
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report that the smart shuffle feature does not work as expected, with inconsistent behavior and a lack of control

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve shuffle feature to prevent shuffling to songs from different playlists
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to listen to songs from the same playlist without shuffling to different playlists
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle feature with user-controlled playlist selection

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance playlist management features to prevent songs from disappearing and make it easier to add songs
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to manage their playlists effectively without issues
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Improved playlist editing and management features

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve weekly discovery feature to provide more accurate recommendations and user control
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to discover new music that they will enjoy and have control over the discovery feature
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced weekly discovery feature with user-controlled preferences and feedback mechanisms

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve smart shuffle feature to provide consistent behavior and user control
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want to have a reliable and enjoyable music listening experience with the smart shuffle feature
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced smart shuffle feature with user-controlled preferences and consistent behavior

RQ6.title: Physical Listening Contexts Impact on Spotify's Discovery Features
RQ6.executive_summary: Users' physical environments, such as the gym or during commutes, significantly impact their experience with Spotify's discovery features. They desire a seamless music listening experience that enhances their workouts and daily activities, with high-energy and motivating playlists being particularly important in workout contexts.

jtbd_summary.situation: When users are in specific physical environments like the gym or commuting
jtbd_summary.motivation: They want to have a high-energy and motivating music experience to boost their performance and achieve their goals
jtbd_summary.outcome: A seamless and effective music discovery experience that meets their needs in various physical contexts

observed_workarounds: Creating and sharing custom workout playlists
Saving and discovering new playlists through online communities

key_findings.finding: Users face difficulties in discovering high-energy playlists suitable for workouts
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Lack of high-energy playlists is a significant issue in workout contexts

key_findings.finding: The app's performance and responsiveness are crucial for a seamless music streaming experience in various physical environments
key_findings.supporting_evidence: App performance issues, such as freezing and crashing, hinder the music listening experience

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Develop personalized workout playlists based on users' preferences and activities
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Lack of high-energy and motivating playlists for workouts
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Integrate AI-driven playlist generation for workout contexts

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve app performance and responsiveness in various physical environments
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: App performance issues hindering the music listening experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Optimize app performance for low-latency music streaming and minimize crashes

RQ7.title: Monetization & Feature Access
RQ7.executive_summary: Free-tier restrictions and premium upselling significantly impact users' music discovery experience and overall satisfaction, with users frustrated by excessive ads, limited features, and lack of control, leading them to consider premium upgrades or alternative services.

jtbd_summary.situation: Users are listening to music on Spotify without a premium subscription
jtbd_summary.motivation: They want to enjoy uninterrupted music without excessive ads and have control over their music playback experience
jtbd_summary.outcome: A seamless and enjoyable music listening experience

observed_workarounds: Using alternative music streaming services
Purchasing a premium subscription
Creating playlists to bypass some limitations
Using the app for a limited time before premium features are locked
Switching to premium
Using third-party apps for additional features

key_findings.finding: Excessive ad frequency is a major frustration for users
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report being interrupted by too many ads, with some experiencing multiple ads before music playback

key_findings.finding: Limited playlist control and playback restrictions frustrate users
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users express frustration with limited skips, playbacks, and inability to control their music playback experience

key_findings.finding: Users are motivated to upgrade to premium or use alternative services due to frustrations with the free version
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Users report considering premium upgrades or switching to alternative music streaming services due to frustrations with ads and limited features

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve the free-tier experience by reducing ad frequency and increasing playlist control
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want an uninterrupted music listening experience with control over their playlists
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Introduce ad-free sessions or reduce ad frequency, and provide more playlist control features in the free version

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance the premium upselling experience by highlighting key benefits and features
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users are unsure about the benefits of upgrading to premium
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Clearly communicate the benefits of premium features, such as ad-free listening and offline playback, and offer personalized recommendations for upgrading
